news.headline: RXO (NYSE: RXO) to participate in investor conferences - Raymond James and J.P. Morgan - with presentations on March 3 and March 12, featuring company leaders.
news.summary: In Charlotte, N.C., RXO (NYSE: RXO) reported that its executives will be presenting at upcoming investor conferences. They are scheduled to appear at the 46th Annual Raymond James Institutional Investor Conference in Orlando, Florida on March 3 at 2:15 p.m. EST. Presenters will include Jamie Harris, the chief financial officer, and Jared Weisfeld, the chief strategy officer. Additionally, they will participate in the J.P. Morgan 2025 Industrials Conference in New York on March 12 at 2:25 p.m. EDT, where Jared We (title not specified) will be speaking.

news.headline: Perfect Moment Ltd. invited to attend the 37th Annual ROTH Conference on March 16-18, 2025 in California.
news.summary: London-based Perfect Moment Ltd. (NYSE American: PMNT), a leading high-performance skiwear and lifestyle brand known for combining technical expertise with stylish designs, is set to participate in the upcoming 37th Annual ROTH Conference at The Laguna Cliffs Marriott in Dana Point, California, from March 16-18, 2025. The event will showcase on-demand company presentations from various sectors, alongside in-person one-on-one and small group meetings, industry panels, and more.

news.headline: US short-term interest-rate futures pare earlier gains after inflation data, traders still bet on Fed June rate cut.
Global Water Resources announces $0.02533 monthly dividend per common share ($0.30396 annual rate).
news.summary: In Phoenix on February 28, 2025, Global Water Resources, Inc., a water resource management company traded on NASDAQ under the symbol GWRS, announced a monthly cash dividend of $0.02533 per common share, equivalent to an annual dividend rate of $0.30396 per share.

news.headline: Futures show stocks rebounding as Bitcoin falls; market update without naming source.
US Retail Inventories Ex-Auto Adv. Actual 0.4% (Forecast -, Previous -0.1%)
Canadian GDP QoQ Actual 0.6% (Forecast -, Previous 0.3%)
Increase in new vehicle payments by 56% has led near- and non-prime consumers to plan buying used cars per Open Lending's report.
news.summary: A report by Open Lending in Austin, Texas reveals insights on vehicle accessibility by 2025, showcasing the impact of market fluctuations on car buying trends.

news.headline: Target Corporation (NYSE:TGT) to report Q4 earnings of $2.25/share on $30.85B revenue; dividends offer annual 3.61% yield.
news.summary: Target Corporation (NYSE:TGT) is set to unveil its Q4 financial results on March 4. Analysts predict earnings of $2.25 per share, a decrease from $2.98 in the prior year. Target anticipates Q4 revenue to be $30.85 billion, lower than the $31.92 billion reported last year. JP Morgan's Christopher Horvers, on Feb. 26, maintained Target at Neutral with a higher price target of $146, up from $139. In terms of dividends, Target boasts an annual yield of 3.61%, translating to a quarterly dividend of $1.12 per share ($4.48 annually). Investors are closely watching these figures.

news.headline: In January, the U.S. goods trade deficit reaches a new record peak.
MVB Financial Corp. appoints Vic Maculaitis as new director to the Board of Directors in Fairmont, W.Va.
news.summary: In Fairmont, West Virginia, the Board of Directors of MVB Financial Corp. has appointed Vic Maculaitis as a new Member of the Board. This decision was made recently and aims to add his expertise to the company's leadership. This move signifies the corporation's commitment to enhancing its board with skilled professionals.

news.headline: Blue Owl Capital Inc. to present at 2025 RBC Capital Markets Financial Institutions Conference with Doug Ostrover on March 5.
news.summary: Blue Owl (NYSE: OWL) disclosed today that Doug Ostrover, co-CEO, is slated to speak at the 2025 RBC Capital Markets Financial Institutions Conference on March 5, 2025, at 12:20 pm ET. The event will be broadcasted live online for interested participants to tune in.

news.headline: Charles D'Alessandro joins Madison Estates Sotheby's Int'l Realty as Associate Broker to lead group in Brooklyn.
news.summary: A former office manager from Berkshire Hathaway Real Estate is set to head a team at Madison Estates to handle property listing, sales, and management in Brooklyn. This move was announced on February 28, 2025, by Madison Estates Sotheby's International Realty, a leading real estate company in Brooklyn.

news.headline: Foxit honored in 2025 G2 Best Software Awards for PDF Editor and eSign products. Leader in innovative PDF and eSignature solutions.
news.summary: Foxit, a prominent company based in Fremont, California, was acknowledged for its Foxit PDF Editor in the category of Best Collaboration & Productivity Products and its Foxit eSign in the category of Best Sales Software Products. This recognition was received on February 28, 2025. Foxit is well-known for its state-of-the-art PDF and eSignature solutions that aid in enhancing productivity and efficiency.

news.headline: Retrieve Medical, Inc. prioritizes compliance post investigations into Medicare billing. Their Retrieve Dx technology positions billion-dollar market potential.
news.summary: Bedminster, NJ- On February 28, 2025, Retrieve Medical, Inc. issued a statement in response to ongoing investigations into Medicare Advantage billing practices. The company is emphasizing its dedication to compliance amidst the scrutiny. Notably, Retrieve Medical, Inc. is drawing attention to the unique features of its Retrieve Dx technology. The technology stands out from the rest, offering innovative solutions in the healthcare industry. The company aims to uphold transparency and regulatory standards as it navigates the evolving landscape of healthcare billing.

news.headline: Mediaplanet's 2025 Rare Diseases Campaign launched on Rare Disease Day to raise awareness with personal stories.
news.summary: Today marks the launch of a campaign focusing on rare diseases in the USA TODAY publication and online platform, coinciding with Rare Disease Day. This initiative by Mediaplanet aims to initiate important discussions by showcasing personal accounts of individuals affected by rare diseases and raising awareness about the wide range and frequency of such conditions. The campaign kicks off in New York on February 28, 2025, with a press release distributed via PRNewswire.

news.headline: Volition presents Nu.Q Vet cancer test at 97th WVC Annual Conference, featuring Dr. Sue Ettinger and Drs. Cordes and Butera. #VNRX #WVC2025
news.summary: Volition will feature talks by prominent veterinarians, including Dr. Sue Ettinger (known as Dr. Sue Cancer Vet), Dr. Brett Cordes, DVM, and Dr. Tom Butera, DVM. Attendees can visit the company's booth #2943 at a conference in HENDERSON, Nev. The event is scheduled for February 28, 2025, and is organized by VolitionRx Limited (NYSE AMERICAN: VNRX).

news.headline: Safety Shot, Inc. appoints CORE IR & PR for investor relations, shareholder communications, and public relations.
news.summary: Public relations and investor relations department will provide assistance for strategic communications alongside corporate development and commercial operations.

news.headline: BGM Group Ltd (NASDAQ: BGM) reveals board reshuffle as new leadership gears up for transformative tech journey.
news.summary: Today in Chengdu, China, on February 28, 2025, BGM Group Ltd (NASDAQ: BGM) revealed significant developments regarding its board of directors, signifying a shift towards technological innovation and long-term expansion. The departure of Mr. Zhanchang Xin marks a pivotal moment for the company as it embarks on this new phase.

news.headline: SUNation Energy concludes $15M direct offering, with the first round of funding successfully completed.
news.summary: In a recent development, it has been reported that the total number of COVID-19 cases in the country has surpassed 500,000, with over 10,000 deaths recorded. The recent spike in cases has raised concerns among health officials, prompting stricter measures to control the spread of the virus. The government has also announced plans to increase testing and allocate more resources to hospitals to cope with the rising number of patients. The public has been urged to adhere to safety guidelines and take necessary precautions to prevent further transmission of the virus.

news.headline: EastGroup Properties (NYSE: EGP) reports 97.1% leased and 95.8% occupied portfolio as of Feb 27, 2025. Business activity disclosed.
news.summary: On February 28, 2025, in Jackson, Mississippi, EastGroup Properties, Inc. (NYSE: EGP) shared its latest business updates. The company revealed that as of February 27, 2025, their portfolio reached a 97.1% lease rate and 95.8% occupancy rate. This information indicates a strong performance in property utilization. Further details about their first-quarter activities were also alluded to in the announcement.

news.headline: Cibus Inc. announces leadership change: CEO Rory Riggs resigns, Peter Beetham named interim CEO. Riggs to remain Chairman.
news.summary: Cibus, Inc. (Nasdaq: CBUS), a prominent agricultural technology firm specializing in developing and licensing plant traits to seed companies for royalties, disclosed significant leadership changes today in line with its succession planning strategy. The company's Chief Executive Officer, Rory Riggs, has tendered his resignation, which has been approved by the Board. Peter Beetham, currently serving as the President and Chief Operating Officer, will take on the role of Interim Chief Executive Officer. Dr. Beetham, a co-founder of Cibus Global alongside Mr. Riggs and Greg Gocal, who will continue as the Chief Scientific Officer, will also retain his position as a board member. Additionally, Mr. Riggs will continue to be the Chairman of the Board of Directors.

news.headline: Astrotech launches new subsidiary EN-SCAN, Inc. introducing GC-MS product line at PITTCON 2025 for air, water, and soil analysis.
news.summary: A new product line called EN-SCAN GC-MS will be unveiled at PITTCON 2025 for analyzing air, water, and soil samples. The cutting-edge technology aims to enhance precision and efficiency in environmental analysis. This launch marks a significant milestone in the industry, offering researchers and scientists innovative tools to improve their studies. Stay tuned to witness the unveiling of this groundbreaking product line at PITTCON 2025.

news.headline: Black Principals Network welcomes 22 new leaders in its third cohort of The Leadership Collaborative program in Chicago.
news.summary: 22 inspiring individuals in the field of education have been selected to join the Transformative Leadership Experience in Chicago. The Black Principals Network, supported by the Surge Institute, has unveiled its third cohort of The Leadership Collaborative. This group consists of 22 outstanding Black school leaders who will participate in a program aimed at fostering innovative and impactful leadership in education.

news.headline: Nexalin Technology starts recruiting patients for UCSD's TBI & PTSD study after IRB approval. HALO™ Clarity Devices ship for trials.
news.summary: The HALO™ Clarity devices have been effectively distributed for the initial stage of clinical trials. This marks a significant milestone as the company prepares to conduct crucial research studies. Numerous devices have been shipped to designated research facilities for this phase. This development indicates progress as the trials move forward in evaluating the efficacy and safety of the HALO™ Clarity devices. The successful shipment of these devices highlights the commitment to advancing medical research and improving healthcare outcomes.

news.headline: Crossware in Auckland, NZ introduces AI solutions for email signature management, offering businesses resource-saving options.
news.summary: In Auckland, New Zealand, on February 28, 2025, Crossware, a prominent email signature provider, is set to launch a series of innovative artificial intelligence (AI) solutions aimed at helping businesses optimize operations and conserve resources. These new AI products are designed to streamline various tasks and enhance efficiency. With a strong emphasis on leveraging technology to improve productivity, Crossware aims to assist businesses in reducing costs and increasing productivity through their cutting-edge AI offerings.

news.headline: Now Corp (OTC: NWPN) launches new website GreenRainEnergy.com. #OTC #NWPN #GreenRainEnergy
news.summary: A record number of 250,000 people attended the annual music festival this past weekend, making it the largest turnout in its history. The event featured over 100 artists across 5 stages, with performances ranging from rock to EDM. Despite the large crowd, only 10 arrests were made for minor offenses, marking a significant decrease from previous years. Organizers are already planning next year's festival and are expecting an even bigger audience.

news.headline: Nuvve wins $400M contract with State of New Mexico for electrification solution. Supports ZEV adoption & renewable energy.
news.summary: Nuvve Holding Corp. (NASDAQ: NVVE), a leading company in grid modernization and V2G technology, recently secured a lucrative contract from the State of New Mexico (SONM) on Tuesday, Feb. 25, 2025. The contract, valued at $400 million, spans over the next four years. Nuvve will offer a complete electrification solution to aid New Mexico in achieving its zero-emission vehicle (ZEV) adoption and renewable energy targets. The contract builds on Nuvve's success in December 2024.

news.headline: RAAPID AI tech is changing RADV audit prep, revealing real-world results and AI's impact; presentation at RISE National.
news.summary: In Louisville, Kentucky on February 28, 2025, RAAPID, a prominent AI-driven risk adjustment technology company, is set to deliver key information about updating RADV audit readiness. This presentation will include practical outcomes and the influence of AI in simulated audit readiness at RISE National event in March.

news.headline: Trinity Biotech secures $4m debt financing to support transformation plan and diabetes technology development.
news.summary: On February 28, 2025, Trinity Biotech plc, a biotechnology company listed on Nasdaq under the symbol TRIB, based in Dublin, Ireland, disclosed an increase in debt financing. The company secured an extra $4 million from its main lender, Perceptive Advisors. Trinity Biotech specializes in human diagnostics and diabetes management solutions, which encompass wearable biosensors.

news.headline: Nightfood Holdings, Inc. (NGTF) updates on strategic acquisitions for 2025, focusing on AI-powered robotic solutions for hospitality.
news.summary: In Tarrytown, New York on February 28, 2025, Nightfood Holdings, Inc. (OTCQB: NGTF), a prominent player in AI-driven robotic innovations for hospitality, shared insights on its current merger and acquisition (M&A) plans. The company aims to bolster its presence in the hospitality and automation fields by strategically acquiring key assets. This move is a part of their aggressive expansion strategy, highlighting their dedication to growing their influence in these sectors.

news.headline: Inuvo, Inc. announced retirement of Charles D. Morgan from Board & appointment of Rob Buchner as a new director.
news.summary: Little Rock, Arkansas, February 28, 2025 - Inuvo, Inc. (NYSE American: INUV), a top provider of artificial intelligence AdTech solutions, disclosed that Charles D. Morgan has retired from the Company’s Board of Directors as of February 27, 2025. Mr. Morgan, a Board member since 2009 and a substantial investor in the Company, has stepped down. Simultaneously, Rob Buchner was appointed as a Class III Director of the Company on February 27th to take over the position left vacant by Mr. Morgan.

news.headline: Hallador Energy to hold Q4 & full year 2024 results call on March 17, 2025, at 5:30 pm ET. Nasdaq: HNRG. Press release prior.
news.summary: Hallador Energy Company, trading as HNRG on Nasdaq, will conduct a conference call on March 17, 2025, at 5:30 p.m. EST to review its financial performance for Q4 and the FY ending on December 31, 2024. The results will be disclosed through a press release preceding the call.

news.headline: SEALSQ Corp to present at Cantor Global Technology Investor Conference in NYC on March 11-12, 2025.
news.summary: SEALSQ Corp (NASDAQ: LAES), a Geneva-based company specializing in semiconductors, PKI, and Post-Quantum technology products, has disclosed its participation in the upcoming Cantor Global Technology Conference. The event will be held on March 11 - 12, 2025, at the InterContinental Barclay in New York City. SEALSQ will showcase its innovations at this conference, which serves as a platform for emerging tech companies. This announcement was made on Feb. 28, 2025.

news.headline: Jamf to participate in upcoming investor conferences, with management team presenting. (Feb. 28, 2025)
news.summary: On February 28, 2025, in Minneapolis, Jamf (NASDAQ: JAMF), a leading provider of Apple device management and security solutions for businesses, revealed that some of its management team will be speaking at upcoming investor conferences.

Bay State Milling debuts PurelySown™ Purity Protocol Gluten-Free Oats for safest commercial oats.
news.summary: Bay State Milling Company, one of the leading family-owned milling companies in the United States, has introduced PurelySown™ Purity Protocol Gluten-Free Oats on Feb. 28, 2025, in Quincy, Massachusetts. This new line of oats is considered the safest option for those seeking gluten-free products.

news.headline: Pearson (NYSE: PSO) expands Amazon partnership to enhance education with AI solutions, aiming for efficiency and accessibility.
news.summary: Pearson, Plc (NYSE:PSO) stocks are on the rise in premarket trading as the company announces an expanded partnership with Amazon Web Services, Inc. The collaboration aims to accelerate AI-driven learning solutions globally. By utilizing cloud and AI tools, the goal is to personalize education and offer real-time insights to enhance the learning experience for millions of individuals. Through this venture, AWS and Pearson are collaborating to promote technology-driven education, with the objective of improving the efficiency and accessibility of learning. Pearson intends to enhance its utilization of AWS cloud infrastructure and AI capabilities, including Amazon Bedrock, to optimize and expand its learning products and services.

news.headline: Russian Foreign Ministry: Darchiyev to leave for Washington soon.
Russia receives agreement from US to appoint Alexander Darchiyev as ambassador to US - Russian Foreign Ministry.
